issues.title: It seems that the document does not mention support for grok. Do you have plans to support it in the future?
issues.body: As the title shows, is there a plan to support grok api in the future?

comments.body: The grok web page says "Our API is compatible with OpenAI and Anthropic’s SDKs. Migrating is as easy as generating an API key and changing a URL."  As with several other model providers - Docker Model Runner, Groq (not to be confused with Grok) , NVidia.  Try that out.    If it looks to work you can contribute an equivalent IT test as with DockerModelRunnerWithOpenAiChatModelIT
